channel.title: Features on Dave Voyles
channel.description: Recent content in Features on Dave Voyles

item.title: How to market your game, XBLIG Style – Part 1
item.description: I just finished putting together a feature geared towards indie developers on how to market their titles. I frequently find that many of the smaller, or even 1 man studios tend to have a difficult time promoting and marketing their work, so I felt it was time for me to share some of the best practices I’ve come across so far. I should have part 2 up some time later in the week. It originally appeared on Armless Octopus on April 16th, and you can access it through this link.
